findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the line keeps its meaning when the negated half is removed.

audits.secondSweep: Completed the dedicated P5/P6 re-read and captured additional road, city, and body-part agency cases.

findings.line: As they closed on the city, the road thickened with traffic.
findings.subject: the road
findings.realAgent: the carts, wagons, and riders crowding the approach
findings.reason: The road is not doing the crowding; the traffic is.
findings.suggestedFix: As they closed on the city, traffic thickened on the road.

findings.line: the sort of face a lane would forget at once
findings.subject: a lane
findings.realAgent: the people passing through the lane
findings.reason: Pattern 6 scenery-memory variant; the lane is not the thing doing the forgetting.
findings.suggestedFix: the sort of face people forgot at once

findings.subject: Stratholme
findings.realAgent: the city's residents continuing their routines
findings.reason: The city itself is not performing the routine; the people in it are.
findings.suggestedFix: Stratholme's people still moved by habit.

findings.line: The first mouth to give one was choking on her arrow.
findings.subject: mouth
findings.realAgent: the next signaler trying to sound a whistle
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; the mouth steals action from the person trying to signal.
findings.suggestedFix: The first one to try was choking on her arrow.

audits.cleanReason: Counted every relevant tic family in the chapter. One corner-of-mouth beat, one "marked" use, one emotional "tightened," and one non-said dialogue tag all stay under their caps, and no other tracked tic family exceeds threshold.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A still has five mild sentence-level issues across negation and intent-smear, which exceeds the three-mild maximum for a pass.
